message:
fix(engine): add stable ThresholdScope text helpers and fix duplicate
std::fmt import

threshold_signing: add const fn as_str() and as_bytes() to ThresholdScope
for stable textual encoding in IDs, JSON, and signing preimages.
Refactor Display impl to delegate to as_str(). Add test verifying
as_str/as_bytes/Display consistency across all scope variants.

ts_shipped_path_evidence: remove duplicate `use std::fmt;` import that
was introduced by a concurrent edit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
